text.title: AI IaC Hallucination Detector Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example end-to-end for ai-iac-hallucination-detector — narrative trace plus the final artefact.

section.title: Narrative trace
section.p: Agent writes `resource "aws_dynamodb_globaltable" "foo" {}` → schema lookup fails → suggestion `aws_dynamodb_global_table` (edit-distance 1) → verdict=fail.
